task.description: Add retention_period and created_at metadata fields to evidence pack template.

l1.content:
{
  "edit_description": "Update evidence-pack-template.json to add 'retention_period' and 'created_at' fields using sed/echo commands.",
  "target_files": ["docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json"],
  "patch_commands": [
    "sed -i 's/retention_period: null/retention_period: 0/' docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json",
    "sed -i 's/created_at: null/created_at: 0/' docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json",
    "sed -i 's/created_at: null/created_at: \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\"/' docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "Evidence pack template now includes required metadata fields (retention_period, created_at) with default values.",
  "risk_notes": "Ensure Python script updates the JSON file correctly. Verify the new fields are valid JSON and not null.",
  "follow_up_type": "needs_review"
}

parsed.edit_description: Update evidence-pack-template.json to add 'retention_period' and 'created_at' fields using sed/echo commands.
parsed.expected_outcome: Evidence pack template now includes required metadata fields (retention_period, created_at) with default values.
parsed.risk_notes: Ensure Python script updates the JSON file correctly. Verify the new fields are valid JSON and not null.
